text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text: What do you think? Does it look like it'll help?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Thank you very much. Might I borrow this for
a time?

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'm honestly just impressed... You're
already prepping for material from the grade
above.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
I recognize that this will not yield extra credit.
However, your notes will deepen my
understanding and...

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Hm? ...Ruby? What's wrong? My notes aren't too
confusing, are they?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Your diligent note-taking is exemplary, and I will
endeavor to follow your lead. Please allow me to
offer you recompense for this service.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
No, you don't need to do that. I'm perfectly
happy doing what I can to support you.
